finding_results.notes: Condensed the family-declaration runway into two pressure-building paragraphs that retain Melie, Suna, Bett, and the hall's public geometry before Fasa lands on Jin.
Varied the later speech failures into a stalled consonant/failed breath and a broken word/air-only pause so each beat worsens the leverage differently.
Recast both Fasa's prompt and Jin's refusal in fresh diction; Jin now explicitly refuses further testimony with Melie present instead of echoing calibration phrasing.
Replaced the chest-object shame metaphor with bodily aftermath, visual fixation, and environmental carry-through.

summary: Compressed the opening approach to Jin, diversified his later speech-failure beats, rewrote the refusal exchange in fresh daughter-centered diction, and replaced the shame-metaphor formula with physical aftermath.
